loop1.title: Energy Input & Distribution
loop1.note: Showing active energy import as the primary distribution flow metric; instantaneous power and utilization are derived or approximated from energy data as per-phase power is not measured for this asset.

loop1.title: Energy Flow Diagram
loop1.note: Showing active energy import/export as primary flow metrics; derived efficiency/loss fields use available power/energy columns as best-effort substitutes for exact Sankey node values.
